error_signature: content of the .txt file is cleared
title: Issue with iconv command clearing output file
symptom: After executing the iconv command to convert Big5 to UTF-8, the content of the output .txt file is cleared instead of being converted.
applies_when: Using iconv to convert file encoding
Output file is expected to contain converted text
not_this_if: Output file contains expected content after conversion
Using a different command for conversion
root_cause: The iconv command does not support in-place editing of files, which means it cannot overwrite the original file directly. Instead, it needs to create a new output file for the converted content.
fix_steps: Run the iconv command to convert the Big5 encoded file and specify a new output file.
Rename or move the new output file to replace the original file if needed.
agent_instruction: Use iconv to create a new output file for the converted content instead of overwriting the original file.
